arts.ttl: Arsenal guaranteed to be without four players vs Everton as Gabriel decision 'confirmed'
arts.sum: Speaking during his pre-match press conference on Friday, Arteta said: "We are used to playing every three days, the boys trained today and they are really fired up and really looking forward to the game and understanding it is a tough opponent and that we will have to be at our best to beat them." Arsenal won both matches against Everton last campaign but Mikel Arteta believes it will be a tough test on Saturday against Sean Dyche's side.

arts.ttl: Arsenal told Victor Osimhen transfer truth as Chelsea admission emerges
arts.sum: football.london says: Arsenal have always seemed to be behind Chelsea in any attempts to snap-up Osimhen, as became apparent on transfer deadline day. Nigeria captain William Troost-Ekong has confirmed Osimhen is a Chelsea fan after being asked about Premier League transfer interest in the player.

arts.ttl: Why isn't Arsenal vs Everton on TV? How to watch Premier League match
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal desperately need all three points when Everton visit the Emirates Stadium today, but fans hoping to tune in on TV in the UK will be left disappointed

arts.ttl: Arsenal Predicted Lineup vs. Everton: Premier League
arts.sum: Arsenal hosts AS Monaco in the Champions League looking to collect three more points.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Everton: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Arsenal host Everton in the Premier League on Saturday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche gives honest opinion of Arsenal's corner threat as Everton boss prepares to get one over Mikel Arteta in the set piece derby
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN AND LEWIS STEELE: Everton's set piece derby against Arsenal on Saturday has been years in the making for manager Sean Dyche.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel reveals Ben White England plan amid Arsenal defender's national team exile
arts.sum: England manager Thomas Tuchel confirms that he will reach out to Arsenal's Ben White to see if the defender is willing to end his national team exile.

arts.ttl: Arsenal in four-team transfer battle for 19-year-old 'revelation' as release clause revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal and Fulham are reportedly two of four Premier League clubs to have submitted enquiries over Corinthians' 19-year-old midfield protege Breno Bidon.

arts.sum: Arsneal and Everton are the joint top scorers in the Premier League from set pieces this term
